description: Measured-basis SLO derived from the maxima of ib-t010-e1-llamacpp@1.0.0 (seed 10010102), via-gateway and engine-direct arms; exists so goodput@SLO can be reported with shed+stall adjacent. Not a production target.

provenance.source: inferbench e1-llamacpp-compare/direct, e1-llamacpp-compare/gateway raw events (270 events scanned, unfiltered including warm-up)
provenance.notes: threshold = measured max 4.501s x 1.35 headroom, rounded up to 0.05 grid

provenance.source: inferbench e1-llamacpp-compare/direct, e1-llamacpp-compare/gateway raw events (270 events scanned, unfiltered including warm-up)
provenance.notes: threshold = measured max 5.650s x 1.35 headroom, rounded up to 0.05 grid

provenance.source: inferbench e1-llamacpp-compare/direct, e1-llamacpp-compare/gateway raw events (270 events scanned, unfiltered including warm-up)
provenance.notes: threshold = measured max 0.588s x 1.35 headroom, rounded up to 0.05 grid

notes: Per-request evaluation: statistic 'max' objectives read as per-request bounds. Derived from the named runs' own events (measured basis, slo.schema.json rule); re-derive when the target or topology changes.
